GENERAL.name: Extra Recovery
GENERAL.desc: You gain extra uses of the recovery button per day.

levels.desc: +1 recovery/day
+2 recovery/day

GENERAL.name: Dungeoneering
GENERAL.desc: You are an expert in dungeon exploration. You can easily find hidden traps or secret doors.

levels.desc: Gain a +10% bonus to find traps and secret doors
Gain a +18% bonus to find traps and secret doors
Gain a +25% bonus to find traps and secret doors

GENERAL.name: Gossip
GENERAL.desc: You know how to be friendly enough to listen to the local news and legends.

levels.desc: Gain a +5% bonus to learn rumors, 3% discount in shops
Gain a +10% bonus to learn rumors, 6% discount in shops
Gain a +15% bonus to learn rumors, 9% discount in shops

GENERAL.name: Beast Master
GENERAL.desc: You are an expert at controlling and hunting beasts. You can't summon more than one creature at the same time.

levels.desc: +2 damage to beasts. Summon a Bear once per day for 30s.
+3 damage to beasts. Summon a Bear 2 times/day for 1 min.
+4 damage to beasts. Summon a Bear 3 times/day for 1 min.

WARRIOR.name: Whirlwind
WARRIOR.desc: Hit all enemies around you with a spinning slash. Pushes back and deals extra damage, maybe stunning them.

levels.desc: Whirlwind does 50% extra damage
Whirlwind deals 75% extra damage, 3% stun chance
Whirlwind deals 100% extra damage, 5% stun chance
Whirlwind deals 120% extra damage, 7% stun chance

WARRIOR.name: Resilience
WARRIOR.desc: For a limited time, you focus in defense, and obtain an armor bonus. You may survive dangers that would normally kill you.

levels.desc: Gain +5 armor for 6 seconds
Gain +9 armor for 8 seconds
Gain +14 armor for 10 seconds

WARRIOR.name: Charge
WARRIOR.desc: Your battle rage drives you through lines of enemies, cutting through them and dealing extra damage.

levels.desc: Charge does +60% damage.
Charge does +90% damage.
Charge does +125% damage.
Charge does +160% damage.

WARRIOR.name: Fury
WARRIOR.desc: When you are injured, your rage increases your damage output making you more dangerous than ever.

levels.desc: When you have less than 30% HP, deal +30% damage
When you have less than 35% HP, deal +50% damage
When you have less than 35% HP, deal +65% damage

WARRIOR.name: Two Handed Expert
WARRIOR.desc: You are especially proficient with two-handed weapons.

levels.desc: When wielding a 2-handed weapon, 5% stun chance
With 2-handed weapons, add your STR x2 to damage (instead of x1.5) and 5% stun chance
With 2-handed weapons, add your STR x2.5 to damage (instead of x1.5), and 10% stun chance

WARRIOR.name: Shield Expert
WARRIOR.desc: You are very experienced at fighting using a shield, in particular to cover from ranged attacks (including magical).

levels.desc: When wielding a shield, +1 armor, an extra +2 vs projectiles.
When wielding a shield, +2 armor, an extra +3 vs projectiles.
When wielding a shield, +3 armor, an extra +4 vs projectiles.

WARRIOR.name: Bash
WARRIOR.desc: Slam into an enemy, to push him back and maybe stun him. Does some damage, and it's a good way to split enemies or escape them.

levels.desc: Enemy pushed back 2 meters and stunned 1 second (+1 second if you use a shield)
Enemy pushed back 3 meters and stunned 2 second (+1 second if you use a shield)
Enemy pushed back 4 meters and stunned 3 seconds (+1 second if you use a shield)

WARRIOR.name: Cleave
WARRIOR.desc: Your attacks are a deadly flurry of slashes. If your attack can hit more than one enemy in front of you, you will hit them all, not just the closest.

levels.desc: You hit one enemy normally, and one extra enemy for 50% damage
You hit one enemy normally, and two extra enemies for 60% damage
You hit one enemy normally, and three extra enemies for 75% damage

ROGUE.name: Stab
ROGUE.desc: You prepare a single, deadly attack. After using this skill, you have a few seconds to launch a blow with extra damage.

levels.desc: your next attack deals extra damage: 6+level
your next attack deals extra damage: 10+level
your next attack deals extra damage: 10+ (level x 1.5)
your next attack deals extra damage: 10+ (level x 2)

ROGUE.name: Stealth
ROGUE.desc: The ability to move without being heard or seen, avoiding enemies or surprising them in combat. If you get close to enemies, they have a chance of spotting you.

levels.desc: You can use stealth mode. Your stealth lasts 8 seconds.
Stealth lasts for 10 seconds and you chance of enemies hearing you is lower.
Stealth lasts 12 seconds, and you have a 50% chance to open doors and chests without being noticed

ROGUE.name: Sneak Attack
ROGUE.desc: When you flank an enemy in melee (attacking by surprise or behind), you will do extra damage, and sometimes stun.

levels.desc: When flanking an enemy, deal +50% damage
When flanking an enemy, deal +70% damage and stun for 1 second(15% chance)
When flanking an enemy, deal +100% damage and stun for 1 second(25% chance)

ROGUE.name: Kick
ROGUE.desc: Hit an enemy's leg to push him back and make his movement slower. Does some damage, and it's a good way to split groups of enemies or escape certain death.

levels.desc: Enemy pushed back 2 meters and slowed 3 seconds
Enemy pushed back 3 meters away and slowed 4 seconds
Enemy pushed back 4 meters away and slowed for 5 seconds

ROGUE.name: Evasion
ROGUE.desc: You focus on defense, dodging incoming attacks for a few seconds.

levels.desc: 50% chance to dodge any attacks during 5 seconds.
70% chance to dodge any attacks during 5 seconds.
90% chance to dodge any attacks during 5 seconds.

ROGUE.name: Trap Master
ROGUE.desc: You are an expert at deactivating traps, or even setting them.

levels.desc: Set trap (15 seconds duration, level 1-3). +10% bonus to disarm traps and locks.
Set trap (20 seconds duration, level 4-6). +20% bonus to disarm traps and locks.
Set trap (30 seconds duration, level 6-10). +30% bonus to disarm traps and locks.

ROGUE.name: Archery
ROGUE.desc: You are an expert in the use of projectile weapons, and deal extra damage and a chance to stun enemies.

levels.desc: Gain +1 arrow damage, and an extra +1 for each 5 levels. 3% stun chance.
Gain +2 arrow damage, and an extra +1 for each 4 levels. 5% stun chance.
Gain +3 arrow damage, and an extra +1 for each 3 levels. 7% stun chance.

ROGUE.name: Sprint
ROGUE.desc: An adrenaline rush will allow you to move extremely fast for a few seconds. It doesn't affect combat, just movement.

levels.desc: You can sprint for 4 seconds.
You can sprint for 5 seconds.
You can sprint for 6 seconds.

NONE.name: Vanish
NONE.desc: (Not implemented yet!) You can step into shadows magically, and appear somewhere else.

levels.desc: To be implemented
To be implemented
To be implemented

CLERIC.name: Heal Wounds
CLERIC.desc: "Heals instantly a certain amount of life, even during combat. It heals you first until you are fully healed; any remaining healing goes to other party members."

levels.desc: Heals a total of 30 HP
Heals a total of 75 HP
Heals a total of 125 HP

CLERIC.name: Holy Shield
CLERIC.desc: Divine Power protects you from harm and from Death Magic.

levels.desc: Gain +4 armor and +25 resistance vs Death, for 12 seconds
Gain +6 armor and +40 resistance vs Death, for 12 seconds
Gain +8 armor and +60 resistance vs Death, for 12 seconds
Gain +10 armor and +80 resistance vs Death, for 12 seconds

CLERIC.name: Sacred Fire
CLERIC.desc: A surge of purifying flames erupts 2 meters ahead of you, consuming your enemies. It deals extra damage to undead.

levels.desc: Flames deal 12 damage, and additional +8 damage to undead
Flames deal 24 damage, and additional +12 damage to undead
Flames deal 48 damage, and additional +20 damage to undead

CLERIC.name: Intervention
CLERIC.desc: In your hour of most need, the Gods intercede to save your life. When you are injured down to death, all your remaining mana is spent, and you are healed.

levels.desc: You are healed for 2 HP for each mana point you had left
You are healed for 4 HP for each mana point you had left
You are healed for 8 HP for each mana point you had left

CLERIC.name: Arbenos' Might
CLERIC.desc: The power of Arbenos the Warrior envelopes you, in the form of sacred flames. You will do more damage, both normal and fire based. Double effect with 2H weapons.

levels.desc: You do +3 damage, and +4 fire damage, for 12 seconds.
You do +5 damage, and +4 fire damage, for 14 seconds.
You do +8 damage, and +4 fire damage, for 16 seconds.

CLERIC.name: Crusader
CLERIC.desc: You have received training as a warrior priest. You know the most efficient ways to combat the undead, causing them Spirit Damage able to bypass armor.

levels.desc: Your hits have a 2% stun chance. Against undead, +2 damage
Your hits have a 4% stun chance. Against undead, +4 damage
Your hits have a 5% stun chance. Against undead, +6 damage

CLERIC.name: Nivaria's Barrier
CLERIC.desc: The mystical power of Nivaria protects you permanently from harm. Particularly, that from the undead

levels.desc: gain +1 armor, an extra +1 vs undead attacks.
gain +2 armor, an extra +2 vs undead attacks.
gain +3 armor, an extra +3 vs undead attacks.

CLERIC.name: Thelume's Wisdom
CLERIC.desc: You are inspired by the revelations of Thelume. You can detect hidden things and see through illusions.

levels.desc: 75% chance of detecting hidden items in a 10m radius. You'll also know about undiscovered doors in the area.
95% chance of detecting hidden items in a 20m radius. You'll also know about undiscovered doors in the area.

WIZARD.name: Lightning Bolt
WIZARD.desc: Lightning erupts from your hands in the direction of the enemy you face (or nearest enemy if you face none), going through it and hitting anyone in a straight line. It has a chance to stun.

levels.desc: Deals 10-15 damage. 20% stun chance.
Deals 15-20 damage, +1/level. 25% stun chance.
Deals 20-28 damage, +2/level. 30% stun chance.
Deals 36-44 damage, +2/level. 40% stun chance.

WIZARD.name: Fireball
WIZARD.desc: Launch a fireball towards the enemy you face (or the nearest enemy if you face none) that will cause a fiery explosion. Beware, as the fire can't tell friend from foe.

levels.desc: Deals 9-18 fire damage.
Deals 15-30 fire damage.
Deals 28-56 fire damage.
Deals 42-84 fire damage.

WIZARD.name: Ice Storm
WIZARD.desc: Project a storm of ice that will cause cold damage to all enemies inside. The storm will last for 5 seconds, and will move randomly.

levels.desc: The storm deals 8-16 cold damage.
The storm deals 12-24 cold damage.
The storm deals 18-36 cold damage.
The storm deals 32-64 cold damage.

WIZARD.name: Mage Armor
WIZARD.desc: Gain a high boost to defenses for a small mana cost. The spell will wear off after a certain number of hits, or after 3 minutes.

levels.desc: Gain +6 armor, wears off after 3 hits.
Gain +9 armor and +15 to fire, cold and shock resistance. Wears off after 4 hits.
Gain +14 armor and +20 to fire, cold and shock resistance, wears off after 5 hits.
Gain +21 armor and +30 to fire, cold and shock resistance, wears off after 6 hits.

WIZARD.name: Wand Mastery
WIZARD.desc: "Wands are the classical weapon of choice of Mages; any Mage ranged weapon wielded by one hand is considered a Wand."

levels.desc: Your wand attacks gain +1 damage and generate a pushback of 1m
Your wand attacks gain +3 damage and generate a pushback of 1.4m
Your wand attacks gain +5 damage and generate a pushback of 1.7m
Your wand attacks gain +8 damage and generate a pushback of 2m

WIZARD.name: Staff Mastery
WIZARD.desc: Staves are powerful channelers of magical energy. Any two-handed Mage weapon  is considered a Staff.

levels.desc: Your attacks have a 25% chance of slowing enemies. Add half your INT to damage (rounding down)
Slow chance of 30%, and add your full INT to damage.
Slow chance of 35%, and add your INTx1.5 to damage.
Slow chance of 40%, and add your INTx2 to damage.

WIZARD.name: Lesser Summoning
WIZARD.desc: Summon a Familiar from the Plane of Energy to fight for you. Familiars are not very strong, but they're very perceptive, adding a +20% bonus to your chance of detecting secrets.

levels.desc: Summon a Level 2-3 Lesser Sparkling.
Summon a Level 4-6 Lesser Sparkling.

WIZARD.name: Mana Surge
WIZARD.desc: Your focus and inner power grants you a larger mana pool.

levels.desc: Increase your mana pool by 3, and +1/level
Increase your mana pool by 6, and +2/level
Increase your mana pool by 9, and +3/level

ROGUE.name: Assassinate
ROGUE.desc: After a succesful Stab, the skill has a chance to immediately cool down and be available again.

levels.desc: 10% chance of Stab immediate cooldown, 30% if the Stab killed the enemy
20% chance of Stab immediate cooldown, 50% if the Stab killed the enemy
35% chance of Stab immediate cooldown, 75% if the Stab killed the enemy

ROGUE.name: Explosive Traps
ROGUE.desc: Your traps explode right after being triggered, causing fire damage in a 2m radius. It also affects you, but not your party members.

levels.desc: Explosion deals 12-24 fire damage
Explosion deals 18-36 fire damage
Explosion deals 24-48 fire damage

ROGUE.name: Poison Master
ROGUE.desc: You are well versed in the dubious art of poisoning your weapons, and your familiarity makes you resistant to many of them.

levels.desc: Increase poison duration by 50%. +10 to Toxic Resistance
Increase poison effect by 25%, and duration by 75%. +20 to Toxic Resistance
Increase poison effect by 50%, and duration by 100%. +30 to Toxic Resistance

ROGUE.name: Invisibility
ROGUE.desc: You can use your Stealth even when enemies have discovered you, poofing out of sight.

levels.desc: 50% chance of using Stealth succesfully in front of enemies
75% chance of using Stealth succesfully in front of enemies, and 75% chance of remaining hidden when opening doors or chests.
95% chance of using Stealth succesfully in front of enemies, and 95% chance of remaining hidden when opening doors or chests.

ROGUE.name: Smoke Bomb
ROGUE.desc: You can use Stealth even if you are surrounded by enemies. Useful to escape, or to prepare a lethal backstab.

levels.desc: Basic smoke bomb, use stealth in front of enemies
Bomb has 35% chance to stun close enemies for 3 seconds
Bomb has 50% chance to stun close enemies for 5 seconds

WARRIOR.name: Battle Rage
WARRIOR.desc: You enter a state of unleashed fury gaining a bonus to STR and armor. You become immune to stun or paralysis, also removing the effect. Afterwards you will be fatigued for 5 s.(-5 damage and armor).

levels.desc: Gain +2 STR, +3 armor, and immunity to mental effects for 6s
Gain +3 STR, +4 armor, and immunity to mental effects for 8s
Gain +4 STR, +5 armor, and immunity to mental effects for 9s

WARRIOR.name: Infantry Training
WARRIOR.desc: You have been trained to survive in the battlefield, giving you an edge to parry and block when you wield both a shield and a hand weapon(not light).

levels.desc: Negate 35% of critical hits received, halve stun duration
Negate 50% of critical hits, immune to stun, halve paralysis time

CLERIC.name: Turn Undead
CLERIC.desc: The Holiness within you can disrupt the undead by your mere presence, paralyzing them.

levels.desc: Paralize for 3 seconds all the undead enemies in a 2 meter radius
Paralize for 4 seconds all the undead enemies in a 4 meter radius
Paralize for 5 seconds all the undead enemies in a 6 meter radius

CLERIC.name: Retribution
CLERIC.desc: Whenever you destroy an undead or an outsider from another plane, you will absorb its essence, transforming it into magical energy. It might not work with certain monsters.

levels.desc: You recover 1 mana point per undead/outsider destroyed.
You recover 2 mana points per undead/outsider destroyed.

CLERIC.name: Guardian Wolf
CLERIC.desc: Summon a wild spirit which takes the form of a wolf and follows you.

levels.desc: Summon a level 7 Dire Wolf for 3 minutes
Summon a level 10 White Wolf for 5 minutes
Summon a level 13 Spirit Wolf for 5 minutes

CLERIC.name: Battle Prayer
CLERIC.desc: You bless your party members, summoned creatures and yourself for the next 12 seconds.

levels.desc: Gain +3 armor and +2 damage
Gain +5 armor, +3 damage and +10 to all resistances
Gain +8 armor, +5 damage and +25 to all resistances

CLERIC.name: Flames of Faith
CLERIC.desc: In a 3m area around you enemies are burned with spiritual flames and allies healed. It lasts 6 seconds and has no effect on you.

levels.desc: Each second, flames heal allies for 5hp and burn enemies for 8 Spirit damage
Each second, flames heal allies for 8hp and burn enemies for 15 Spirit damage
Each second, flames heal allies for 10hp and burn enemies for 21 Spirit damage

WIZARD.name: Disintegrate
WIZARD.desc: You call upon devastating magical energies to enhance your next weapon attack with a large amount of normal damage. The attack must be done quickly or the power vanishes.

levels.desc: Disintegrate does +50 damage on your next attack
Disintegrate does +75 damage on your next attack, +1/level
Disintegrate does +100 damage on your next attack, +2/level

WIZARD.name: Mage Barrier
WIZARD.desc: Your Mage Armor is improved, becoming dangerous and frustrating for your foes. Enemies hitting you in melee while your Mage Armor is active will be affected.

levels.desc: Enemies pushed back 1m and receive 12 Shock Damage
Enemies pushed back 1.5m and receive 25 Shock Damage. Stun chance 10%
Enemies pushed back 2m and receive 40 Shock Damage. Stun chance 30%

WIZARD.name: Arcanist
WIZARD.desc: You are capable of powering wands and staves labeled as Arcane without requiring so much mana.

levels.desc: Reduces mana cost by 1
Reduces mana cost by 2
Reduces mana cost by 3

WIZARD.name: Fire Mastery
WIZARD.desc: You are capable of summoning an elemental from the Plane of Fire for 3 minutes. They are capable of dealing good damage, but rather fragile. You can only keep one summoned creature at the same time and its level can never go above yours.

levels.desc: Summon a level 7 Fire Elemental
Summon a level 10 Fire Elemental
Summon a level 13 Fire Elemental

WIZARD.name: Ice Mastery
WIZARD.desc: You are capable of summoning an elemental from the Plane of Ice for 3 minutes. They're very resilient creatures. You can only keep one summoned creature at the same time and its level can never go above yours.

levels.desc: Summon a level 7 Ice Elemental
Summon a level 10 Ice Elemental
Summon a level 13 Ice Elemental

WIZARD.name: Earth Mastery
WIZARD.desc: You are capable of summoning an elemental from the Plane of Earth for 3 minutes. You can only keep one summoned creature at the same time and its level can never go above yours.

levels.desc: Summon a level 8 Earth Elemental
Summon a level 11 Earth Elemental
Summon a level 15 Iron Golem

WIZARD.name: Arcane Blade
WIZARD.desc: As an Arcane Knight you can use any Hand weapon or Light weapon that deals additional fire, cold or shock damage.

levels.desc: Weapon works normally
Weapon elemental damage improved x1.5
Weapon elemental damage improved x2
Weapon elemental damage improved x2.5

WIZARD.name: Vampiric Blade
WIZARD.desc: As an Arcane Knight you can use any melee weapon that deals death damage, even two-handed weapons.

levels.desc: Weapon works normally. Each killed enemy will heal you for 5hp
Weapon death damage improved x1.5. Each killed enemy will heal you for 5hp and, if it's a spellcaster or outsider, +3 mana
Weapon death damage improved x2. Each killed enemy will heal you for 10hp and, if it's a spellcaster or outsider, +5 mana

WIZARD.name: Combustion
WIZARD.desc: In a 3m area around you enemies are burned. They also suffer a reduction of their Armor and resistances to Fire, Cold and Shock for 15 seconds.

levels.desc: Deals 15-30 Fire damage. Enemies lose -3 Armor, -20 to Resistances
Deals 20-40 Fire damage. Enemies lose -6 Armor, -40 to Resistances
Deals 28-56 Fire damage. Enemies lose -10 Armor, -60 to Resistances

WIZARD.name: Death Cloud
WIZARD.desc: Launch a poisonous cloud towards the enemy you face (or the nearest enemy if you face none). Besides dealing damage it will reduce resistance to Death and slow enemies for 12 seconds.

levels.desc: Deals 10-20 toxic damage, enemy is slowed and suffers -30 Death resistance
Deals 14-28 toxic damage, enemy is slowed and suffers -50 Death resistance
Deals 18-36 toxic damage, enemy is slowed and suffers -80 Death resistance
